title: Elementify
description:
Elementify

Adds a Scientist Villager who trades real chemical elements. Use them to craft powerful, element-themed weapons with unique effects.
body:
Elementify brings the periodic table into Minecraft! A new Scientist Villager has arrived, offering trades for real-world chemical elements like Hydrogen, Iron, Uranium, and more.

But these elements aren't just collectibles – combine them to craft powerful weapons, each themed after the elemental properties they represent.

🔬 Features:
🧪 Trade real elements from the periodic table with a new Scientist Villager.

⚔️ Craft elemental weapons with unique effects (e.g. radioactive damage, fire attacks, explosive force).

🌍 Explore and collect rare elements through trading (mining coming soon!).

🔄 Balanced to fit naturally into survival gameplay.

📦 Compatibility:
Minecraft Version: 1.21.4

Mod Loader: NeoForge

Java Version: Requires Java 21 or newer
